summary: Tested LMS Setup step in school onboarding workflow, reschedule modal scrolling, and Orders page MOU Document + Accounts Coordinator sections. All features verified working. Fixed one bug: token undefined error in LMSSetupSection component.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminSchoolCRM.jsx - Fixed token undefined error in LMSSetupSection authToken prop
seed_data_creation: Added accounts_coordinator contact to Walle school for testing Accounts Coordinator section
context_for_next_testing_agent: LMS Setup step only appears in onboarding workflow after student credentials are uploaded via POST /api/schools/{school_id}/lms-students. Accounts Coordinator section only appears when school has a contact with role 'accounts_coordinator', 'accountant', or role containing 'account'.

reschedule_modal_scrolling.details: Reschedule modal has max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto classes for scrolling. Modal shows calendar, time slots, and reason textarea.

lms_setup_step.details: LMS Setup step appears in onboarding workflow with: Upload Student Credentials section, Download Sample Template button, Upload File button, shows uploaded students count and date.

mou_document_section.details: MOU Document section appears at bottom of School Details modal in Orders page with View MOU and Download links.

accounts_coordinator_section.details: Accounts Coordinator section appears with cyan background highlighting (bg-cyan-50), shows contact name, phone (clickable), and email (clickable).

bug_fixed.issue: token is not defined error in LMSSetupSection component
